title: Scrum framework configuration
description: Schema for .scrum/config.json. Existing keys (test_runner, coverage_tool, pragma_pattern, path_guard, merge_regression) are tolerated via additionalProperties: true so this schema can be introduced without forcing a migration. New keys added for autonomous-PO mode (po_mode, po, autonomous) are constrained.

po_mode.description: Who plays the Product Owner role. 'human' = wait for user input at PO decision points (default when key absent). 'agent' = a Claude teammate (product-owner) decides automatically.

max_clarification_rounds.description: How many clarification round-trips with SM before the PO must commit a decision under best-effort.

max_integration_cycles.description: Maximum number of integration-sprint defect-fix cycles before releasing as-is or aborting.
